name: Crackling Triangles
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Spring roll pastry, in (One sheet)
2 tbsp Oil plus oil for deep frying
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the spring roll sheet into long strips about 3-3.5 cm (1 1/4 - inch) wide.
2. Marinate the minced beef with soy sauce, 1 teaspoon sugar, 1 teaspoon sherry, and 2 tablespoons water for 30 minutes.
3. Heat oil in a wok. Sauté shallots, garlic, and onion until fragrant. Add chili, ginger, and beef; fry until dry, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
4. Pour in remaining sherry, sugar, water, five spice powder, paprika, and seasoning to taste. Set aside to cool.
5. Place a generous teaspoon of filling on a strip of pastry. Fold over the end corner to enclose the meat in a triangle of dough.
6. Fold from the opposite side, then continue folding the dough over until completely enclosed, forming a triangular shape. Tuck the end neatly.
7. Repeat with all filling and pastry.
8. Heat oil for deep frying to 190°C/375°F. Deep fry triangles until crisp and golden. Drain on absorbent kitchen paper and serve.
